findings.native_rationale: "XL" hija abbrevjazzjoni ta' "xlokk" (southeast), mhux l-isem sħiħ tad-direzzjoni tat-tramuntana. Għall-valur sħiħ ta' N f'Malti għandu jintuża "tramuntana".
evidence: src/Humanizer/Properties/Resources.mt.resx: key "N" currently uses "XL" while key "N_Short" is "T".
tests/Humanizer.Tests/Localisation/mt/HeadingTests.cs: full heading currently expects "XL" at 0°, indicating the resource is carrying an abbreviation in a full-form key.
findings.notes: Wrong cardinal direction term in full heading output.
findings.adjudicated_rationale: Nikkonferma d-difett: fil-Malti, il-punt kardinali N għandu jkun "tramuntana". "XL" hija abbrevjazzjoni ta' "xlokk" (SE) u ma tistax tintuża bħala forma sħiħa ta' N.
adjudicated_evidence: src/Humanizer/Properties/Resources.mt.resx: "N" huwa "XL" (linji 402-404) filwaqt li "N_Short" huwa "T" (linji 429-431), jiġifieri l-key sħiħ qed juża forma ħażina.
tests/Humanizer.Tests/Localisation/mt/HeadingTests.cs: fit-test ToHeading, 0° jistenna "XL" fil-full style, li juri propagazzjoni diretta tal-valur żbaljat tar-riżorsa.

findings.native_rationale: Għall-kategorija singulari b'placeholder numeriku, in-nom għandu jibqa' fis-singular: "{0} sena". Il-forma attwali "{0} snin" hi plural u tagħti qbil grammatikali żbaljat.
evidence: tests/Humanizer.Tests/Localisation/mt/TimeSpanHumanizeTests.cs: one-year output is "sena", confirming the singular stem.
src/Humanizer/Properties/Resources.mt.resx: parallel pattern exists in "TimeSpanHumanize_MultipleMinutes_Singular" as "{0} minuta" (number + singular noun).
findings.notes: Singular/plural agreement defect in numeric template.
findings.adjudicated_rationale: Nikkonferma d-difett morfoloġiku: il-key singulari trid forma nominali singulari. "{0} snin" hija plural, waqt li l-forma korretta f'dan il-kuntest hija "{0} sena".
adjudicated_evidence: src/Humanizer/Properties/Resources.mt.resx: "TimeSpanHumanize_MultipleYears_Singular" hu "{0} snin" (linji 579-580), li hu plural minkejja l-kategorija singular.

src/Humanizer/Properties/Resources.mt.resx + tests/Humanizer.Tests/Localisation/mt/TimeSpanHumanizeTests.cs: "TimeSpanHumanize_SingleYear" hu "sena" u t-testijiet ta' sena waħda jistennew "sena", li jappoġġja "{0} sena" għas-singular numeriku.
